_comment: Workflow metadata - DO NOT edit phases array manually, it's auto-generated from phase_registry
name: Product Builder CLI End-to-End Workflow
description: Five-phase workflow with conditional branching, parallel steps, task-loop execution, and multi-model review auto-repair.
_comment_structure: This workflow uses a dual-structure design: (1) 'phases' array provides a unified Phase 0-4 view for UI/progress tracking across all modes, (2) 'phase_registry' object contains modular step groups that are composed via 'pipeline' fields to support three progressive modes (Lite ⊂ Standard ⊂ Full) and enable runtime mode switching/degradation.
_comment_modes: Three progressive modes with increasing automation: Lite (16 steps, manual, no OpenSpec/review) ⊂ Standard (51 steps, manual, with OpenSpec/review) ⊂ Full (56 steps, auto-loop via ralph). Each mode uses different 'pipeline' compositions from 'phase_registry' modules. Supports runtime mode switching and automatic degradation when tools are unavailable.
_comment_phases_warning: ⚠️ WARNING: The 'phases' array is AUTO-GENERATED from 'phase_registry'. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY! To modify workflow, edit 'phase_registry' modules and run: node generate-phases-from-registry.js
